description_long: This is a dark metallic helmet reminiscent of ancient Greek or Roman military headgear, featuring a pronounced crest running from front to back along the top. The front displays a T-shaped opening for the eyes and mouth, with a raised decorative emblem or medallion at the center of the brow. The helmet's dome is smooth and rounded, with a subtle hammered texture visible across its surface. The sides extend downward to protect the cheeks, while the rear flares out to shield the neck. The overall finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the helmet's robust, protective design. There are no visible ventilation holes, fasteners, or modern attachments.
description: A glossy, dark metallic ancient-style helmet with a crest, T-shaped face opening, and decorative brow emblem. The surface is smooth and rounded, with cheek and neck guards.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped face opening, central brow emblem, and the crest running over the top.
description_view_1: Side-rear angle highlights the smooth dome, the full length of the crest, and the flared neck guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the crest and the flared neck guard, with no facial opening visible.
description_view_3: Side-front angle reveals the cheek guard, the side profile of the crest, and part of the face opening.
attribute_graphic_design: A raised decorative emblem or medallion on the brow; otherwise, the helmet is a solid dark metallic color with no additional graphics.
